description: Realistic balanced payload. Multiple zones present in topZones[]. averagePerAuditor is between 8–15. averageLapsedPerAuditor between 1–4. topReAuditAuditors has 8–10 items with reAuditPercentage spread across 40–85%. auditorStartedAfterSchedule has 6–8 entries with remainingCount > 0.

Realistic balanced payload. Multiple zones present in topZones[]. averagePerAuditor is between 8–15. averageLapsedPerAuditor between 1–4. topReAuditAuditors has 8–10 items with reAuditPercentage spread across 40–85%. auditorStartedAfterSchedule has 6–8 entries with remainingCount > 0.

totalLapsedAudits = 0, totalAuditorsWithLapsed = 0, averageLapsedPerAuditor = 0. All zones have lapsedCount = 0 and notExecutedCount = 0, so totalDelayedAudits = 0 for all zones. Tests explicit zero reporting.

High lapsed scenario. totalLapsedAudits is 60+ across all auditors. averageLapsedPerAuditor is 10+. Leading zone has totalDelayedAudits over 40 with large notExecutedCount. averagePerAuditor for In Progress is low (< 5).
topZones[] contains exactly 1 zone. That zone has all the delayed audits. Tests how narrator handles a single-zone delayed scenario without runner-up mention.

Top auditor in topReAuditAuditors has reAuditPercentage = 100.0% (all audits gone to re-audit). At least 3 auditors above 90%. Bottom auditors in the list are still above 70%. Tests high-end re-audit percentage reporting.
totalSchedulesWithLateStart = 0, totalUniqueAuditors = 0, displayedCount = 0, remainingCount = 0, items = []. Tests explicit zero / empty list handling for the late-start bullet.
totalSchedulesWithLateStart = 5, displayedCount = 5, remainingCount = 0, items[] has exactly 5 entries. Tests that the narrator does NOT append 'and 0 more' when remainingCount = 0.
totalSchedulesWithLateStart = 12, displayedCount = 5, remainingCount = 7. items[] has exactly 5 entries. Tests that the narrator appends 'and 7 more' correctly after listing the 5 auditor names.
Top two zones in topZones[] have identical totalDelayedAudits count. Different lapsedCount and notExecutedCount breakdown. Tests how narrator handles a tie scenario where both zones are leading.
